description: Kaggle T4×2 free-tier accelerator. Python 3.10, torch 2.10.x+cu128. Targets sm_75 (Turing). Pinned for the Apr/May 2026 stack.

wheels.name: flash_attn-2.7.4+cu128torch2.10-cp310-cp310-linux_x86_64.whl
wheels._note: size_bytes and sha256 left blank for first-time setup. Run `python scripts/cache_setup.py --profile kaggle/2xt4` once on Kaggle, then `sha256sum` the downloaded wheel and update this manifest before publishing. Primary URL is the future GitHub Release; the fallback is the well-known community wheel that always works for sm_75. Note that T4 (sm_75) does NOT actually run FA2 — the harness's `_attn_impl_for_hardware` gate detects this and falls back to SDPA mem-efficient. The wheel is still installed so the `import flash_attn` check in the gate doesn't trip.

data_caches.name: huggingface_hub
data_caches.description: Pre-populated HF Hub cache containing Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507, declare-lab/delta-mem_qwen3_4b-instruct, and the unsloth Qwen3.5-4B-MTP-GGUF set. Saves 5-8 minutes of model download per fresh kernel.

data_caches.name: pip_wheelhouse
data_caches.description: Optional: pre-downloaded pip wheels for requirements.txt. If present, `pip install --find-links` shaves ~60s off bootstrap.
